languages.original_text: "It is gratifying that no one tried to trespass on my laboratory during our captivity. I have many more purifying sacraments to perform before I am finally rid of that Haemonculus's foulness."

languages.text: "Отрадно, что никто не попытался вторгнуться в мою лабораторию за время нашего плена. Мне предстоит свершить еще много очистительных таинств, прежде чем я окончательно избавлюсь от скверны гемункула".
"It is gratifying that no one tried to trespass on my laboratory during our captivity. I have many more purifying sacraments to perform before I am finally rid of that Haemonculus's foulness."
languages.original_text: "Отрадно, что никто не попытался вторгнуться в мою лабораторию за время нашего плена. Мне предстоит свершить еще много очистительных таинств, прежде чем я окончательно избавлюсь от скверны гемункула".

traits.locale_text: "It is gratifying that no one tried to trespass on my laboratory during our captivity. I have many more purifying sacraments to perform before I am finally rid of that Haemonculus's foulness."
"It is gratifying that no one tried to trespass on my laboratory during our captivity. I have many more purifying sacraments to perform before I am finally rid of that Haemonculus's foulness."
"It is gratifying that no one tried to trespass on my laboratory during our captivity. I have many more purifying sacraments to perform before I am finally rid of that Haemonculus's foulness."

languages.text: «Es gratificante que nadie haya intentado profanar mi laboratorio durante nuestro cautiverio. Tengo muchos sacramentos purificadores más que realizar antes de librarme por completo de la maldad de ese Hemónculo».
languages.original_text: "It is gratifying that no one tried to trespass on my laboratory during our captivity. I have many more purifying sacraments to perform before I am finally rid of that Haemonculus's foulness."

traits.locale_text: «Es gratificante que nadie haya intentado profanar mi laboratorio durante nuestro cautiverio. Tengo muchos sacramentos purificadores más que realizar antes de librarme por completo de la maldad de ese Hemónculo».

languages.text: 「我々の監禁中、誰一人として私の研究室に侵入を試みなかったのは喜ばしいことです。あのハエモンクルスの汚らわしさを完全に拭い去るまでには、まだ多くの浄化の聖礼を執り行わねばなりません」
languages.original_text: "It is gratifying that no one tried to trespass on my laboratory during our captivity. I have many more purifying sacraments to perform before I am finally rid of that Haemonculus's foulness."

traits.locale_text: 「我々の監禁中、誰一人として私の研究室に侵入を試みなかったのは喜ばしいことです。あのハエモンクルスの汚らわしさを完全に拭い去るまでには、まだ多くの浄化の聖礼を執り行わねばなりません」

languages.text: “令人欣慰的是，我们被俘期间没人试图闯入我的实验室。我还要完成许多净化圣礼，才能彻底摆脱那个血伶人的污秽。”
languages.original_text: "It is gratifying that no one tried to trespass on my laboratory during our captivity. I have many more purifying sacraments to perform before I am finally rid of that Haemonculus's foulness."

traits.locale_text: “令人欣慰的是，我们被俘期间没人试图闯入我的实验室。我还要完成许多净化圣礼，才能彻底摆脱那个血伶人的污秽。”

languages.text: "Dankenswerterweise hat während unserer Gefangenschaft niemand versucht, mein Labor zu betreten. Ich muss noch zahlreiche reinigende Sakramente durchführen, ehe ich das Übel dieses Haemonculus abgestreift habe."
languages.original_text: "It is gratifying that no one tried to trespass on my laboratory during our captivity. I have many more purifying sacraments to perform before I am finally rid of that Haemonculus's foulness."

traits.locale_text: "Dankenswerterweise hat während unserer Gefangenschaft niemand versucht, mein Labor zu betreten. Ich muss noch zahlreiche reinigende Sakramente durchführen, ehe ich das Übel dieses Haemonculus abgestreift habe."

languages.text: « Il est gratifiant de savoir que personne n'a tenté de s'introduire dans mon laboratoire pendant notre captivité. Je vais devoir accomplir de nombreux sacrements purificateurs avant de pouvoir me débarrasser de l'ignominie de l'hémoncule. »
languages.original_text: "It is gratifying that no one tried to trespass on my laboratory during our captivity. I have many more purifying sacraments to perform before I am finally rid of that Haemonculus's foulness."

traits.locale_text: « Il est gratifiant de savoir que personne n'a tenté de s'introduire dans mon laboratoire pendant notre captivité. Je vais devoir accomplir de nombreux sacrements purificateurs avant de pouvoir me débarrasser de l'ignominie de l'hémoncule. »

languages.text: "Esaretimiz sırasında kimsenin laboratuvarıma girmeye çalışmaması sevindirici. Haimonkulus'un iğrençliğinden tamamen kurtulmadan önce yapmam gereken daha pek çok arındırıcı ayin var."
languages.original_text: "It is gratifying that no one tried to trespass on my laboratory during our captivity. I have many more purifying sacraments to perform before I am finally rid of that Haemonculus's foulness."
